improvements.original: 2. **layout & spacing**: the layout is somewhat cluttered with various elements competing for attention. the spacing between sections is inconsistent, which can make it difficult to scan the page quickly. there's a lack of visual hierarchy that could guide the user's eye through the content more effectively.

improvements.description: Increase app title font size for better readability
improvements.original: - the font size is small, which might make it difficult for some users to read. increasing the font size or providing a larger view option could improve accessibility.

improvements.description: Increase app title font size for better readability
improvements.original: - increase font size for better readability.

improvements.css: /* Improved color contrast throughout the app */
improvements.description: Enhance color contrast for better accessibility
improvements.original: - improve contrast between interactive elements and their backgrounds.
